activities.name: Run 3, Bonk 1
activities.description: Don’t eat that cookie after lunch, and I’d you do eat something else too!

activities.name: New rails; new trails
activities.description: Visiting all three of the light rail stations that opened today with my regular weekend crew + an adventure in the Thornton Creek drainage.

activities.name: Truncated Dayton
activities.description: Less bread for lunch next time

activities.name: The shape you get when you change your mind
activities.description: Was going to go 4, then decided not, then had to finish 2 while still making a Jordan curve.

activities.name: Sluggish, but good to move
activities.description: Via the post office for a mailing.

activities.name: Tie a bow on the end of a string
activities.description: Mintu and Herve pushed me. Ran better than I have in many months. Thank you gents!

activities.name: The end of the beginning
activities.description:
Today is my last day on the job for Microsoft. I am retiring from paid work, and will be making myself useful in other ways.

Coming soon: David’s Rules of Retirement Running. Stay tuned.

activities.name: Lovely morning at Bridle Trails with Tamara, Steve, Ana, and Herve
Great walk in timber country with J, L, and Tug, and Surf
Small number of local hill repeats
Leafy streets and trails of North Mercer
activities.description: With Mark D as my guide. Great to be running with him again

activities.name: Half a “standard tangle” with Lauren
activities.description: Who didn’t bail after 2 miles like me.

activities.name: Little leg stretcher down the Bright Angel trail
Rim to same rim
activities.description: I’ve done Rim to Rim, and I can tell you this is a better route: You see much more canyon diversity and logistics are much simpler. Thanks to Herve, Ana, Steve, Mintu and Anita for joining me!

activities.name: Testing the course for “FOD’s Frontyard Ultra”
activities.description:
FOD stands for Friends of David, which is everyone who reads this message. Each lap starts and ends in front of my house, so I claim Green Lake and Woodland Park for my front yard! Google “Bigs Backyard Ultra” if you aren’t familiar with events like this.

When will it happen? I’m thinking a weekend in Spring, but not concrete plans yet. 

Leave a comment if you’re even slightly curious about this, and I’ll keep you in the loop as planning progresses.

activities.name: Glorious foggy fall run on All Hallows’ Eve
activities.description: Exactly 1 year to the day since we did this run last time. It’s now a Halloween tradition. Thanks Mintu, Anita, Lauren and Tamara.
